response.original_title: Why everyone should have pee-friendly cycling shorts
response.overview: After multiple workshops and hearing from women who love to ride but HATE having to take off all their layers to go pee, finally we have a prototype of our pee-friendly bib shorts! We are looking for testers to give these shorts a go for a season and give us feedback, check out more details at www.riderawr.com
response.title: Why everyone should have pee-friendly cycling shorts
